allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Pictures\\Screenshots" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 8 Name, LastWriteTime, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($pages = Get-ChildItem "src/app/\(pages\)/\(protected\)" -Recurse -Filter "page.tsx"; "Total protected pages: $\($pages.Count\)"; $noAppCard = $pages | Where-Object { -not \(Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern "app-card" -Quiet\) }; "Pages WITHOUT app-card: $\($noAppCard.Count\)"; $withCardComp = $noAppCard | Where-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern "from '@/components/ui/card'" -Quiet }; "  of those, using ui/Card component: $\($withCardComp.Count\)")

PowerShell(\(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).devDependencies | Format-List; \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).dependencies.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object Name -match "tailwind|next$" | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell($c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/%5Broot-of-the-server%5D__039o5ya._.css" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $i = $c.IndexOf\('content: var\(--page-title'\); "content-var at: $i"; $j = $c.IndexOf\('.app-card-title'\); "app-card-title rule at: $j"; if \($j -ge 0\) { $c.Substring\($j-100, 900\) })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\issues_xlsx"; [xml]$ss = Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\sharedStrings.xml" -Encoding UTF8; $strings = @\($ss.sst.si | ForEach-Object { \($_.t -join ''\) + \(\($_.r | ForEach-Object { $_.t }\) -join ''\) }\); [xml]$sheet = Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml" -Encoding UTF8; foreach \($row in $sheet.worksheet.sheetData.row\) { $cells = foreach \($c in $row.c\) { if \($c.t -eq 's'\) { $strings[[int]$c.v] } else { $c.v } }; "ROW $\($row.r\): " + \($cells -join ' | '\) })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\issues_xlsx"; [xml]$ss = Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\sharedStrings.xml" -Encoding UTF8; $strings = @\($ss.sst.si | ForEach-Object { $parts = @\(\); foreach \($n in $_.ChildNodes\) { if \($n.LocalName -eq 't'\) { $parts += $n.InnerText } elseif \($n.LocalName -eq 'r'\) { foreach \($rn in $n.ChildNodes\) { if \($rn.LocalName -eq 't'\) { $parts += $rn.InnerText } } } }; $parts -join '' }\); [xml]$sheet = Get-Content "$tmp\\xl\\worksheets\\sheet1.xml" -Encoding UTF8; foreach \($row in $sheet.worksheet.sheetData.row\) { if \(@\(19,22,23,31,35,36,56,59\) -contains [int]$row.r\) { $cells = foreach \($c in $row.c\) { if \($c.t -eq 's'\) { $strings[[int]$c.v] } else { $c.v } }; "ROW $\($row.r\): " + \($cells -join ' | '\) } })

PowerShell(Test-Path "src/app/\(pages\)/\(protected\)/admin-examination-management/post-examination/internal-exam-attendance-marking/page.tsx"; Test-Path "src/app/\(pages\)/\(protected\)/admin-examination-management/post-examination/external-exam-attendance-marking/page.tsx"; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin-examination-management/post-examination/internal-exam-attendance-marking" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r1.StatusCode; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin-examination-management/post-examination/external-exam-attendance-marking" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r2.StatusCode)

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://matrusri-pre.skolis.in/assets/images/college-banner.png","https://matrusri-pre.skolis.in/assets/images/banner.png","https://matrusri-pre.skolis.in/assets/images/logo.png","https://matrusri-pre.skolis.in/assets/img/college-banner.png"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) $u" } catch { "FAIL $u" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\("https://matrusri-pre.skolo.in/assets/images/avatars/default_logo.png","https://matrusri-pre.skolo.in/assets/images/college-banner.png"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\) $u" } catch { "FAIL $u : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "todo/Source/examination/pre-examination/exam-hallticket" -File | Select-Object Name, Length; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; if \($?\) { "TSC CLEAN" })

PowerShell($href = "admin-examination-management/admin-post-examinations/exam-attendance-marking"; $lines = Get-Content "src/components/layout/NavItem.tsx"; for \($i = 1020; $i -lt 1395; $i++\) { $line = $lines[$i]; if \($line -match "hrefLower\\.includes\\\('\([^']+\)'\\\)"\) { $term = $Matches[1]; if \($href.Contains\($term\)\) { "line $\($i+1\): MATCHES '$term' :: $\($line.Trim\(\)\)" } } })

PowerShell($href = "/attendance-management/mark-attendance"; $label = "internal exam attendance marking"; $lines = Get-Content "src/components/layout/NavItem.tsx"; for \($i = 1030; $i -lt 1382; $i++\) { $line = $lines[$i]; if \($line -match "hrefLower\\.includes\\\('\([^']+\)'\\\)"\) { $t = $Matches[1]; if \($href.Contains\($t\)\) { "line $\($i+1\): HREF MATCH '$t' :: $\($line.Trim\(\)\)" } }; if \($line -match "labelLower\\.includes\\\('\([^']+\)'\\\)"\) { $t = $Matches[1]; if \($label.Contains\($t\)\) { "line $\($i+1\): LABEL MATCH '$t' :: $\($line.Trim\(\)\)" } } })

PowerShell($p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 8724"; "cmd: $\($p.CommandLine\)"; "cwd via handle not avail; parent: $\($p.ParentProcessId\)"; $pp = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = $\($p.ParentProcessId\)"; "parent cmd: $\($pp.CommandLine\)")
